milestoneComparison: Alpha-24 generates a portable real-operator handoff packet with manual apply, validation, rollback, decisions, and evidence links.
Alpha-25 replays and audits operator handoff packets in disposable worktrees, including unsafe-packet rejection evidence.
findings: 16 lifecycle items reference older milestones and should be reviewed.
recommendations: Keep packets and dashboard/index records as runtime truth; use OKF as portable memory.
Review candidate knowledge and skills before promotion.
Next milestone: replay and audit existing operator handoff packets in disposable worktrees.
